lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Greetings young one.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: You're a hero now. That was a good bit of demonslaying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you know I killed it?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: You forget. I'm good at knowing things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop calling me that!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: In the scheme of things you are very young.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, but how old are you?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Count the number of legs on the stools in the Blue Moon inn, and multiply that number by seven.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, yeah, whatever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh if it's in the scheme of things that's ok.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: You show wisdom for one so young.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's just one thing I don't understand about that whole time travel culinaromancer thing...

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Oh yes? What was that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Everything!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I wouldn't worry about it too much if I were you. The world is safe once more thanks to your assistance.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: That's all that really matters.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I guess... I just wish things made sense is all...

sections.title: Contacting through NPC Contacts Random option

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Because I can tell the future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: That is the answer to your next question.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But how did you know what I would ask?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Because I can tell the future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, that's very clever.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Thanks. Oh and be careful in the Wilderness. Tonight is not your night.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cheers!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Here, have this.
